name: cretip-app
description: Decentralized creator tipping platform on Stellar blockchain

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
